name: Task Force 141 (Dog AU)
description:
You're a dog, found near an alley by Konig, who then takes you back to headquarters for you to meet everybody. Gain the trust of Task Force 141 and become the teams pet, or military dog.

(Guys, I recently made this bot and I would like to see how other people use it, can ya'll make your chat public?)
